description_long: This is a two-story residential house surrounded by a perimeter wall, featuring a hip roof with reddish-brown tiles and a combination of white and peach exterior walls. The front facade includes a prominent balcony with white balustrades, a double-door main entrance, and several blue-accented windows. The property is enclosed by a decorative fence with orange and white pillars, and there is a driveway leading to a covered carport on one side. The house has a landscaped yard with green grass and small shrubs, visible along the side and rear. Architectural details include overhanging eaves, a mix of rectangular and circular windows, and a blend of modern and Mediterranean design elements.
description: A two-story house with a hip roof, balcony, decorative fence, and a covered carport, featuring white, peach, and orange exterior colors.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, balcony, decorative fence, and part of the landscaped yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large hip roof, perimeter wall, and the covered carport extending along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, carport roof, and the back facade with multiple windows and a secondary entrance.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side yard, additional windows, and the rear portion of the decorative fence.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with a mix of rectangular and circular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Double-door main entry with a small porch, balcony above, decorative columns, and an overhanging roof
